name: IRC_REC_CAMPAIGNS_V
query: SELECT RECC.ACTIVATED_ON_DATE, RECC.CAMPAIGN_CODE, RECC.CAMPAIGN_DURATION_CODE, RECC.CAMPAIGN_ID, RECC.CAMPAIGN_LANGUAGE_CODE, RECC.CAMPAIGN_STATUS_CODE, RECC.CAMPAIGN_TYPE_CODE, RECC.CANCELLED_ON_DATE, RECC.CLOSED_ON_DATE, RECC.CREATED_BY, RECC.CREATION_DATE, RECC.ELIG_OBJ_ID, RECC.ELIG_PRFL_ID, RECC.JOURNEY_ID, RECC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RECC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RECC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, RECC.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RECC.PURPOSE_CODE FROM IRC_CAMPAIGNS_B RECC WHERE CAMPAIGN_TYPE_CODE = 'ORA_REC_CAMPAIGN'
